# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

// Type definitions for our configuration
interface EdgeConfigData {
  apiKeys: {
    primary: string;
    secondary?: string;
  };
  databaseUrls: {
    primary: string;
    readonly?: string;
  };
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewDashboard: boolean;
    enableBetaApi: boolean;
    maintenanceMode: boolean;
    rateLimitPerMinute: number;
    allowedOrigins: string[];
  };
}

// Default configuration values - used as fallback when Edge Config is unavailable
const DEFAULT_CONFIG: EdgeConfigData = {
  apiKeys: {
    primary: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  },
  databaseUrls: {
    primary: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  },
  featureFlags: {
    enableNewDashboard: false,
    enableBetaApi: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    rateLimitPerMinute: 60,
    allowedOrigins: ['https://example.com'],
  },
};

// Sanitize and validate configuration values
function validateApiKey(key: unknown): string {
  if (typeof key !== 'string' || key.length === 0 || key.length > 256) {
    throw new Error('Invalid API key format');
  }
  // Only allow alphanumeric, underscores, hyphens, and dots
  if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]+$/.test(key)) {
    throw new Error('API key contains invalid characters');
  }
  return key;
}

function validateDatabaseUrl(url: unknown): string {
  if (typeof url !== 'string' || url.length === 0 || url.length > 1024) {
    throw new Error('Invalid database URL format');
  }
  // Validate it starts with an allowed protocol
  const allowedProtocols = ['postgresql://', 'postgres://', 'mysql://'];
  const hasValidProtocol = allowedProtocols.some((proto) => url.startsWith(proto));
  if (!hasValidProtocol) {
    throw new Error('Database URL must use an allowed protocol');
  }
  return url;
}

function validateFeatureFlags(flags: unknown): EdgeConfigData['featureFlags'] {
  const defaults = DEFAULT_CONFIG.featureFlags;

  if (!flags || typeof flags !== 'object') {
    return defaults;
  }

  const f = flags as Record<string, unknown>;

  const rateLimitPerMinute =
    typeof f.rateLimitPerMinute === 'number' &&
    Number.isInteger(f.rateLimitPerMinute) &&
    f.rateLimitPerMinute > 0 &&
    f.rateLimitPerMinute <= 10000
      ? f.rateLimitPerMinute
      : defaults.rateLimitPerMinute;

  const allowedOrigins = Array.isArray(f.allowedOrigins)
    ? f.allowedOrigins.filter(
        (origin: unknown): origin is string =>
          typeof origin === 'string' &&
          origin.length > 0 &&
          origin.length <= 256 &&
          /^https:\/\/[a-zA-Z0-9\-\.]+\.[a-zA-Z]{2,}$/.test(origin)
      )
    : defaults.allowedOrigins;

  return {
    enableNewDashboard:
      typeof f.enableNewDashboard === 'boolean' ? f.enableNewDashboard : defaults.enableNewDashboard,
    enableBetaApi: typeof f.enableBetaApi === 'boolean' ? f.enableBetaApi : defaults.enableBetaApi,
    maintenanceMode:
      typeof f.maintenanceMode === 'boolean' ? f.maintenanceMode : defaults.maintenanceMode,
    rateLimitPerMinute,
    allowedOrigins: allowedOrigins.length > 0 ? allowedOrigins : defaults.allowedOrigins,
  };
}

function validateConfig(raw: unknown): EdgeConfigData {
  if (!raw || typeof raw !== 'object') {
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  const data = raw as Record<string, unknown>;

  let apiKeys: EdgeConfigData['apiKeys'];
  try {
    const rawKeys = data.apiKeys as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    apiKeys = {
      primary: rawKeys?.primary ? validateApiKey(rawKeys.primary) : DEFAULT_CONFIG.apiKeys.primary,
      secondary: rawKeys?.secondary ? validateApiKey(rawKeys.secondary) : undefined,
    };
  } catch {
    apiKeys = DEFAULT_CONFIG.apiKeys;
  }

  let databaseUrls: EdgeConfigData['databaseUrls'];
  try {
    const rawUrls = data.databaseUrls as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    databaseUrls = {
      primary: rawUrls?.primary
        ? validateDatabaseUrl(rawUrls.primary)
        : DEFAULT_CONFIG.databaseUrls.primary,
      readonly: rawUrls?.readonly ? validateDatabaseUrl(rawUrls.readonly) : undefined,
    };
  } catch {
    databaseUrls = DEFAULT_CONFIG.databaseUrls;
  }

  const featureFlags = validateFeatureFlags(data.featureFlags);

  return { apiKeys, databaseUrls, featureFlags };
}

// Mask sensitive values for safe logging/responses
function maskSecret(value: string): string {
  if (value.length <= 8) {
    return '***';
  }
  return value.substring(0, 4) + '***' + value.substring(value.length - 4);
}

function createSafeConfigSummary(config: EdgeConfigData) {
  return {
    apiKeys: {
      primary: maskSecret(config.apiKeys.primary),
      secondary: config.apiKeys.secondary ? maskSecret(config.apiKeys.secondary) : undefined,
    },
    databaseUrls: {
      primary: maskSecret(config.databaseUrls.primary),
      readonly: config.databaseUrls.readonly ? maskSecret(config.databaseUrls.readonly) : undefined,
    },
    featureFlags: config.featureFlags,
  };
}

// Simple in-memory rate limiter for the edge function
const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>();

function checkRateLimit(clientIp: string, maxPerMinute: number): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(clientIp);

  if (!entry || now > entry.resetAt) {
    rateLimitMap.set(clientIp, { count: 1, resetAt: now + 60_000 });
    return true;
  }

  if (entry.count >= maxPerMinute) {
    return false;
  }

  entry.count++;
  return true;
}

// Clean up stale rate limit entries periodically
function cleanupRateLimitMap() {
  const now = Date.now();
  for (const [key, entry] of rateLimitMap) {
    if (now > entry.resetAt) {
      rateLimitMap.delete(key);
    }
  }
}

// CORS origin validation
function isAllowedOrigin(origin: string | null, allowedOrigins: string[]): boolean {
  if (!origin) return false;
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

// Load configuration from Edge Config with fallback to defaults
async function loadConfig(): Promise<{ config: EdgeConfigData; source: string }> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    return { config: DEFAULT_CONFIG, source: 'defaults (EDGE_CONFIG not set)' };
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    // Fetch individual config items from Edge Config
    const [apiKeys, databaseUrls, featureFlags] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get('apiKeys'),
      edgeConfigClient.get('databaseUrls'),
      edgeConfigClient.get('featureFlags'),
    ]);

    const rawConfig = { apiKeys, databaseUrls, featureFlags };
    const validatedConfig = validateConfig(rawConfig);

    return { config: validatedConfig, source: 'edge-config' };
  } catch (error) {
    // Log error securely without exposing sensitive details
    console.error('Failed to read Edge Config, using defaults:', error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error');
    return { config: DEFAULT_CONFIG, source: 'defaults (edge-config read failed)' };
  }
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  // Only allow GET requests
  if (request.method !== 'GET') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Allow': 'GET',
      },
    });
  }

  // Periodic cleanup
  cleanupRateLimitMap();

  // Load configuration
  const { config: appConfig, source } = await loadConfig();

  // Extract client IP for rate limiting
  const clientIp =
    request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
    request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||
    'unknown';

  // Validate client IP format (basic check)
  const sanitizedIp = /^[\d.:a-fA-F]+$/.test(clientIp) ? clientIp : 'unknown';

  // Apply rate limiting
  if (!checkRateLimit(sanitizedIp, appConfig.featureFlags.rateLimitPerMinute)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.' }),
      {
        status: 429,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '60',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // CORS validation
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  const corsHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};

  if (origin && isAllowedOrigin(origin, appConfig.featureFlags.allowedOrigins)) {
    corsHeaders['Access-Control-Allow-Origin'] = origin;
    corsHeaders['Vary'] = 'Origin';
  }

  // Check maintenance mode
  if (appConfig.featureFlags.maintenanceMode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      {
        status: 503,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Retry-After': '300',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Parse the URL path for routing
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const path = url.pathname;

  // Route: /api/config - returns safe config summary (no secrets)
  if (path === '/api/config' || path === '/api/config/') {
    const safeConfig = createSafeConfigSummary(appConfig);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        configSource: source,
        config: safeConfig,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate',
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
          'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Route: /api/features - returns feature flags only (safe to expose)
  if (path === '/api/features' || path === '/api/features/') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        features: appConfig.featureFlags,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=10, stale-while-revalidate=30',
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
          'Referrer-Policy': 'no-referrer',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Route: /api/health - health check endpoint
  if (path === '/api/health' || path === '/api/health/') {
    const edgeConfigAvailable = source === 'edge-config';

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'healthy',
        edgeConfig: edgeConfigAvailable ? 'connected' : 'using defaults',
        configSource: source,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Route: /api/validate - validates a provided API key against stored keys
  if (path === '/api/validate' || path === '/api/validate/') {
    const authHeader = request.headers.get('authorization');

    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Missing or malformed Authorization header' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'WWW-Authenticate': 'Bearer',
            'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    const providedKey = authHeader.substring(7);

    // Validate the provided key format first
    let validatedProvidedKey: string;
    try {
      validatedProvidedKey = validateApiKey(providedKey);
    } catch {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid API key format' }),
        {
          status: 401,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    // Constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks
    const isValid = timingSafeEqual(validatedProvidedKey, appConfig.apiKeys.primary) ||
      (appConfig.apiKeys.secondary
        ? timingSafeEqual(validatedProvidedKey, appConfig.apiKeys.secondary)
        : false);

    if (!isValid) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid API key' }),
        {
          status: 403,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
            ...corsHeaders,
          },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'authenticated',
        features: appConfig.featureFlags,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
          'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
          ...corsHeaders,
        },
      }
    );
  }

  // Default: 404 for unknown routes
  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not found',
      availableEndpoints: ['/api/config', '/api/features', '/api/health', '/api/validate'],
    }),
    {
      status: 404,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-store',
        'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
        ...corsHeaders,
      },
    }
  );
}

// Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing attacks
function timingSafeEqual(a: string, b: string): boolean {
  if (a.length !== b.length) {
    // Still do a comparison to maintain constant time behavior
    // Compare against itself to burn the same amount of time
    let result = 1; // non-zero means not equal
    for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
      result |= a.charCodeAt(i) ^ a.charCodeAt(i);
    }
    return false;
  }

  let result = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
    result |= a.charCodeAt(i) ^ b.charCodeAt(i);
  }
  return result === 0;
}
